data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
u^a(X, Y) = LayerNorm(X + a(X, Y))
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.

data.content:
```latex
Attention(Q, K, V) = \text{softmax} \left( \frac{QK^T}{\sqrt{d}} \right) V

a(X, Y) = Attention(q(X), k(Y), v(Y))
```

```

data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
u^s(X,Y) = \gamma(a(X,Y)) \odot \omega(X) + \beta(a(X,Y))
```

This will produce the same mathematical expression as shown in the image.
